paragraphs: Invited by AMI Paris to depict the essence of friendship in Seoul, I turned my lens toward the streets and faces of Hannam-dong. Rather than staged moments, the series focuses on the unscripted warmth of daily encounters, native textures, and personal spaces. It is a visual ode to the quiet bonds formed within our own neighborhoods.
View the series on AMI Family: https://family.amiparis.com/en/hannam
